name: super-bootstrap
description: Self-hosted marketplace for super-bootstrap — greenfield-aware superpowers pipeline bootstrap (super-bootstrap → harness-bootstrap, plus commit, todo, log, help, merge, and optional release-init).

plugins.name: super-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap gates greenfield (lean ideation Q&A → seed docs), then installs the harness: CLAUDE.md, skeleton docs, path-scoped rules, curated skill/MCP/hook picks. Bundles commit, todo, log, help, merge, and optional release-init — all namespaced under super-bootstrap: except the entry. Per-skill contracts live in each SKILL.md frontmatter (canonical catalog); plugin README carries the index. Solo dev workflow.
